hero.subtitle: Software Developer with expertise in backend systems, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and microservices architecture

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Software Developer with 2+ years building production systems. I focus on backend architecture, cloud infrastructure on AWS, and microservices design — from database modeling and API design to deployment pipelines.
about.p2: Currently at Moneta Market, where I design and operate a microservices stack on AWS (EC2, RDS, S3) using Docker Compose and Nginx as reverse proxy. I also work as an independent contractor building full-stack systems with React, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.monetaB1: Designed and orchestrated a microservices architecture using Docker Compose, integrating Python APIs and configuring Nginx as a reverse proxy
experience.monetaB2: Set up deployment environments on AWS (EC2, S3, RDS), applying least-privilege IAM policies and securing credentials with AWS Secrets Manager
experience.monetaB3: Managed relational databases on Amazon RDS (PostgreSQL), establishing secure connections via SSH tunneling through bastion hosts
experience.monetaB4: Built backend services and webhooks for automated data synchronization and processing across multiple cloud containers
experience.rogaB1: Developed ERP modules using .NET/VB, DevExpress, and SQL Server
experience.rogaB2: Built geolocation tracking system with Azure Maps API
experience.rogaB3: Database design, stored procedures, and performance tuning
experience.rogaB4: Collaborated using Scrum methodology with TFS version control

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.scDesc: Full-stack system with cloud infrastructure, RESTful APIs, and database management. Built with Flask, PostgreSQL on AWS, and integrated ML capabilities.
projects.sdDesc: Custom dataset training for personalized image generation. Explored deep learning model fine-tuning techniques.
projects.galagaDesc: Unreal Engine game controlled via smartphone accelerometer using Processing and HTTP requests.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Looking to build backend systems, cloud infrastructure, or scalable APIs? Let's connect.
